name: @le-space/rootfs
description: Shared rootfs contract parsing, reference profile assets, and build helpers.

scripts.build: node --check ./src/index.ts && node --check ./src/contract.ts && node --check ./src/build-plan.ts && node --check ./src/manifest.ts && node --check ./src/execution-plan.ts && node --check ./src/publication.ts && node --check ./src/orchestration.ts && node --check ./src/executor.ts
